paper_title: High resolution orthophotos and a digital surface model of the Roman city of Pollentia (Mallorca, Spain) using RPAS imagery, aerial images, and open data archives

methods.method_name: Ground Control Points and Checkpoints Generation
methods.description: This method involves generating ground control points (GCP) and checkpoints (CHP) for use in image triangulation and validation. GCPs are used in triangulation, while CHPs are used for validation. The coordinates of these points are obtained using image triangulation techniques.

steps.description: The GCP and CHP are observed both in aerial and RPAS imagery.
steps.searchable_summary: observe GCP and CHP in aerial and RPAS imagery

steps.description: The coordinates of these points are obtained using image triangulation techniques.

methods.description: This method involves the aerial triangulation of RPAS imagery using image coordinates, initial orientation, and ground coordinates from GCP. The exterior orientation and camera calibration parameters are estimated using a bundle adjustment approach, validated using RMSE.

steps.description: Perform aerial triangulation of RPAS imagery using image coordinates of homologous points, initial orientation from GNSS, and ground coordinates from GCP.
steps.searchable_summary: perform aerial triangulation using image coordinates and GNSS data

steps.description: Estimate exterior orientation and camera calibration parameters using a bundle adjustment approach.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate orientation and calibration using bundle adjustment

steps.description: Validate the triangulation using RMSE between estimated coordinates of checkpoints and ground coordinates.

methods.method_name: Dense Point Cloud, DSM, and Orthophoto Generation
methods.description: This method involves generating a dense point cloud, digital surface model (DSM), and orthophotos using photogrammetric software tools.

steps.description: Generate dense point cloud using photogrammetric software tools.
Generate DSM from the dense point cloud.
steps.searchable_summary: generate DSM from dense point cloud
